Balle Balle Punjabi Samosa
Minced Potato Mixed with Green Peas, Raisins, Cashewnuts

Balle Punjabi Tikki Chole 黃金薯餅佐蓮子豆咖哩ntd 410
Aloo Chole Tikki is a Famous Street food of India. Tikki are
made of Potatoes with Indian Flavoured Spices, served with
Chickpea Gravy in a Rich Tangy Sauce Accompanied with
Mint & Tamarind Chutney.
Veg Manchurian's
滿洲獅子丸 ntd 410
Manchurian is the result of the Adaption of Chinese cooking
& seasoning techniques to suit Indian tastes.Its developed by
Small Chinese Comunity which lived in Kolkatta for century.
